title: Protector (disambiguation)
content:
'''Protector''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*[[Fenn Rau]], the "Protector of Concord Dawn"
*The [[Final Protector]], a [[Jedi]] statue on [[Jedha]]
*The [[Protector (Planet X)|protector]], a being on [[Sophros|Planet X]]
*The [[Journeyman Protector]]s

==Legends==
*The [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]]
*The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Protector (Victory-class)|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer '''''Protector''''']].
*The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer '''''Protector''''']]
**The [[holo-serial]] based on the above ship, ''[[The Voyages of the VSD Protector]]''
*The Empire's and later [[Imperial Remnant]]'s [[Protector (Victory II-class)|''Victory-II''-class Star Destroyer '''''Protector''''']]
*The Republic shuttle '''''[[Protector (shuttle)|Protector]]'''''
*[[Imperial Sovereign Protector]].
*The [[Skyborn|Protectors]], [[Deity/Legends|gods]] of [[Keshiri/Legends|Keshiri]] legend
*[[Grand Protector|Grand Protector of the Rodians]]
*[[Chief Protector]], a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] title honoring a clan's best [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]]
*[[Protector (Rin'na)]], a Rodian title honoring the best hunters of a clan
*The [[Protectors (law enforcement)|Protectors]], a law enforcement group on the planet [[Essowyn]]
*The [[Protectors (Makeb)|Protectors]], a civilian volunteer militia on the planet [[Makeb]]

{{Disambig}}
